name: video-walkthrough-skill
description: Claude Code skill: Playwright-сценарии как автотесты + видео-инструкции с субтитрами по шагам

scripts.video:voice: python3 "$([ -f lib/narrate.py ] && echo lib/narrate.py || echo "$HOME/.claude/skills/video-walkthrough/lib/narrate.py")" videos
scripts.video:voice:hq: python3 "$([ -f lib/narrate.py ] && echo lib/narrate.py || echo "$HOME/.claude/skills/video-walkthrough/lib/narrate.py")" videos --engine edge
